title: mentha × kerneri var. chrysii
intro: Mentha × kerneri var. chrysii, also known as Chrysanthemum balsamita, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is believed to be a hybrid of Mentha × kerneri and Mentha chrysii. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating digestive issues and reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of Mentha × kerneri var. chrysii include its ability to relieve nausea, improve digestion, and alleviate stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
